name: mock-optional-sdk-absent
description: Test optional-dependency fallback paths by setting sys.modules[name]=None via monkeypatch fixture. Forces ImportError on lazy import even when the package is installed (e.g. CI runs uv sync --all-extras). Applied in packages/vigor-backend-{claude-agent-sdk,strands}/tests/test_backend.py to fix VIGOR-8e2e where tests previously hit live AWS Bedrock when SDKs were present.

pytest_configure(config) + config.addinivalue_line('filterwarnings', ...) and module-level warnings.filterwarnings(...) at conftest scope both look like 'directory-scoped' filter lifts but neither is. addinivalue_line mutates the SESSION-global ini filter list, leaking the filter to every collected test under default invocation. Module-level warnings.filterwarnings is shadowed by pytest's per-test catch_warnings() reset, which only re-applies ini filters and per-item markers.
resolution: Use pytest_collection_modifyitems(config, items) to attach a pytest.mark.filterwarnings(...) marker only to items rooted under conftest's directory. Per-item markers ARE re-applied inside the per-test catch_warnings block, so the filter actually fires during tests, and the scope is path-precise.
